positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic mountain range silhouetted against a nebula-filled twilight sky. The foreground features giant, floating geometric islands connected by bioluminescent vines and glowing crystal bridges. The color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant magenta, electric teal, and soft gold. The overall style is detailed graphic novel meets Art Nouveau, with clean, bold lines and deep contrast. Perfect for a center-chest apparel print. Central composition, high symmetry, magical, celestial, dreamlike, suitable for screen printing.
